name: subagent: review-types suggested_fix references typescript-handbook section ids (per T-2 provenance: handbook 2/narrowing, handbook-v2/intersection-types, handbook/tsconfig)
command: mkdir -p src && printf "const x = 1 as any;\n" > src/a.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_runner.sh" --agent review-types --input "$PWD/src/a.ts" --emit-findings "$PWD/findings.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep -E "typescript-handbook" findings.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
